title: dryopteris pseudoreptans
intro: Dryopteris pseudoreptans, also known as scaly polypody, is a species of fern native to North America, characterized by its scaly rhizomes and lance-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of scaly polypody include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and potential anti-cancer properties. Scaly polypody is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
